title: Salesforce document and email builder backend-first contract
salesforce_visible_capabilities: Salesforce document builder with CRM/Matter/Billing merge fields
Publish approved document draft to DMS/Vault

current_ui_boundary: Matter > documents may use tested Vault inventory, search, audit, summary, and document facade upload routes

Matter > documents may not show a Salesforce-style document builder, template picker, approval request button, publish-approved-draft action, email composer, or send action until mounted route tests and provider gates exist
Existing Vault upload surfaces are not document-builder parity; they store a supplied document through DMS and keep bytes, storage paths, and raw extracted text hidden
Email-related current model support is limited to DmsEmailThread with email_runtime_executed false and reserved_for_rp08 true

route_policy_contract.service_boundary: Read template registry scoped by tenant, matter type, language, practice area, and permission; return metadata and merge-field allowlist only
Create an internal document draft from an approved template and allowlisted CRM/Matter/Billing merge refs; raw generated bytes are not returned
Patch allowlisted draft title, status, template version, safe merge refs, and reviewer metadata only; no arbitrary HTML, script, provider payload, or document bytes
Return a safe preview envelope with section labels, redaction state, and missing merge fields; raw document bytes and raw contact values omitted
Create approval request and audit evidence; required approver policy and dual-control rules must come from owner-approved policy before UI exposure
Read approval state and safe reviewer labels only; direct user identifiers and private approver notes omitted
Publish only an approved draft to DMS/Vault through uploadDocument and append Matter timeline/audit evidence; storage pointer and document bytes stay hidden
Create internal email draft/log from approved template metadata and allowlisted recipients; no external send, no raw recipient values in response
Patch subject label, safe excerpt, approval state, and recipient role refs only; raw message body and direct recipient identifiers omitted
Blocked until Microsoft Graph Mail or approved provider gate, sender authority, retention policy, approval receipt, and audit receipt are implemented

safe_output_rules: template body omitted unless preview route has permission
merge refs must use stable ids, not raw personal contact values
billing detail snapshots reduced to safe labels and amounts permitted by policy

owner_decision_required: whether requester and approver must differ
whether client-visible drafts require separate review
safe_output_rules: direct user identifiers omitted from UI response
approval receipts must be auditable before publish
publish requires approved draft and idempotency key
email_runtime_executed remains false until provider gate resolves
send action blocked without owner-approved provider receipt

owner_decisions_required: merge-field allowlist for Client, Matter, Billing, and DMS refs
approval policy by template and matter type
DMS/Vault publish retention and legal-hold policy
external email provider and sender authority
external_provider_dependencies: Optional document generation/PDF conversion provider if native rendering is not implemented in-repo
verification_cases: VC-SF-B-W04-API-001: template registry read returns safe metadata and merge-field allowlist only
VC-SF-B-W04-API-002: builder draft create is idempotent, permission-gated, and stores no raw bytes in response
VC-SF-B-W04-API-003: builder draft patch accepts only allowlisted fields and rejects raw HTML/script
VC-SF-B-W04-API-004: preview route omits document bytes and raw contact values
VC-SF-B-W04-API-005: approval request creates audit/timeline evidence and enforces owner-approved policy
VC-SF-B-W04-API-006: approval read hides direct user identifiers and private notes
VC-SF-B-W04-API-007: publish-to-vault requires approved draft and returns safe DMS/Vault envelope
VC-SF-B-W04-API-008: email draft create stores internal draft/log only and does not send externally
VC-SF-B-W04-API-009: email draft patch keeps raw body and recipient values out of the response
VC-SF-B-W04-API-010: email send route remains blocked until provider gate, approval receipt, and audit receipt exist
VC-SF-B-W04-UI-001: Matter UI exposes no document builder, email composer, approval, publish, or send controls before route/provider tests pass

required_before_ui_exposure: OMO CodeGraph caller check for builder draft, approval, publish, and email send handlers
Hermes MCP check-only: hermes.validate.core and hermes.desktop_authority_boundary

decision_boundary: This contract registers backend-first work only. It does not authorize document/email builder UI, external email send, production, deployment, final approval, or enterprise trust claims.
